title: BankLedger Financial System
problem: Traditional ledgers utilizing a single integer for balance validation are highly vulnerable to Time-Of-Check to Time-Of-Use (TOCTOU) race conditions during concurrent network requests, resulting in catastrophic mathematical corruption.
challenges: Addressed an O(N) database aggregation bottleneck where infinite lifetime history scaled poorly. Deployed MongoDB sessions mapping idempotency keys to fundamentally eliminate duplicate processing overhead.

title: Nutino Event-Driven AI Pipeline
problem: Monolithic, synchronous news aggregation platforms routinely suffer from severe server-side blocking, resulting in UI freezing during high-token generative LLM payloads.
challenges: Transformed synchronous API hits into an event-driven queue. Engineered an intelligent LLM conditional router abstracting Gemini and Mistral dynamically based on required context lengths, heavily optimizing token throughput.
